_comment: AgentCore Gateway configuration template. Defines how the agent is exposed as an API endpoint. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values.

auth_type._comment: Supported types: IAM, API_KEY, COGNITO. IAM is recommended for service-to-service. COGNITO for user-facing agents.

rate_limit._comment: Rate limits protect the agent from overload and control cost. Adjust based on expected traffic.

mcp_servers.name: <MCP_SERVER_NAME>
mcp_servers._comment: For production, use streamable-http transport with a deployed server URL instead of stdio.

logging._comment: Set include_request/response_body to true only in development. Never log request/response bodies in production with sensitive data.
